jobs.title: Manager of Teen and Intergenerational Programs
jobs.description: The Museum of Arts and Design (MAD) seeks a Manager to join the Education department. This public-facing position is responsible for the development, planning, and production of inventive intergenerational programs.
responsibilities: Planning and implementation of intergenerational programming
Daily management of MAD’s Project Space
Managing Artslife summer intensive programs
Budget management and attendance reporting
requirements: Minimum 3 years of experience in museum programming
Bachelor’s degree in Art History or related field
Knowledge of contemporary art and design
Ability to work on-site and occasional evenings

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Developer
jobs.description: We are looking for a Senior Frontend Developer to lead our UI team in building scalable web applications using React and Tailwind CSS.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain complex user interfaces
Optimize applications for maximum speed
Mentor junior developers and conduct code reviews
Collaborate with UX designers to implement design systems
requirements: 5+ years of experience with React.js
Proficiency in TypeScript and state management
Strong understanding of responsive design
Experience with CI/CD pipelines

jobs.title: Clinical Research Coordinator
jobs.description: Join our oncology department to coordinate clinical trials and manage patient data according to regulatory standards.
responsibilities: Recruit and screen eligible trial participants
Maintain precise regulatory documentation
Coordinate patient visits and laboratory tests
Report adverse events to the Institutional Review Board
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Science or Healthcare
2 years of clinical trial experience
Certified Clinical Research Professional (CCRP) preferred
Strong attention to detail and ethics

jobs.title: Sustainability Consultant
jobs.description: EcoLogic is seeking a consultant to help corporate clients reduce their carbon footprint and implement ESG strategies.
responsibilities: Conduct carbon audits and energy assessments
Develop sustainability reports for stakeholders
Advise on renewable energy transitions
Liaise with environmental regulatory bodies
requirements: Master’s degree in Environmental Science or MBA
Knowledge of LEED and GRI reporting standards
Proven analytical and problem-solving skills
Excellent client presentation abilities

jobs.title: UX Content Strategist
jobs.description: Craft clear, concise, and helpful copy for our mobile banking app to improve user navigation and satisfaction.
responsibilities: Design end-to-end content strategies
Write microcopy for UI components
Conduct readability and usability testing
Maintain the internal brand voice guide
requirements: 4+ years of UX writing or content strategy experience
Portfolio of shipped digital products
Experience working in Figma and Jira
Background in English or Communications

jobs.title: Lead Barista & Trainer
jobs.description: Manage our flagship cafe's bar operations and train new staff on brewing techniques and latte art.
responsibilities: Oversee daily cafe operations and inventory
Maintain high standards of espresso quality
Train team members on menu items and service
Ensure health and safety compliance
requirements: 3 years of specialty coffee experience
Previous supervisory or training experience
Deep knowledge of coffee origins and roasting
Strong customer service skills

jobs.title: Warehouse Operations Manager
jobs.description: Direct and coordinate the daily activities of our distribution center to ensure efficient shipping and receiving.
responsibilities: Manage a team of 50+ warehouse associates
Optimize floor layout and inventory workflows
Enforce strict OSHA safety standards
Analyze operational costs and budgets
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Supply Chain or Logistics
5 years of management experience in a fast-paced hub
Proficiency in WMS software
Ability to work in a non-climate controlled environment

jobs.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
jobs.description: Drive growth for our e-commerce clients through targeted PPC campaigns and SEO optimization.
responsibilities: Manage Google Ads and Meta Ads budgets
Perform keyword research and on-page SEO
Analyze campaign performance using GA4
Create monthly reports for client stakeholders
requirements: Google Ads Certification required
Experience managing monthly spends over $10k
Strong analytical and copywriting skills
Ability to manage multiple client accounts

jobs.title: Museum Security Supervisor
jobs.description: Oversee the protection of museum assets, visitors, and staff through active monitoring and team leadership.
responsibilities: Supervise daily security patrols and stationing
Conduct emergency response drills
Manage electronic surveillance systems
Liaise with local law enforcement
requirements: 5 years of security or military experience
Clean background check and security license
Strong leadership and de-escalation skills
First Aid/CPR Certification

jobs.title: Junior Data Analyst
jobs.description: Support the marketing and sales teams by cleaning data and creating visual dashboards of consumer trends.
responsibilities: Clean and validate sales data sets
Build dashboards in Tableau or PowerBI
Assist in preparing quarterly market reports
Automate repetitive data collection tasks
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Math, Statistics, or CS
Proficiency in SQL and Excel
Basic knowledge of Python or R
Strong curiosity for consumer behavior
